name: Fox News
notes: Right bias. Mixed factual reporting. Often frames stories with conservative perspective.

name: RT (Russia Today)
notes: Strong pro-Russian government bias. Frequently presents alternative narratives on geopolitics.

name: Reuters
notes: Least biased. Very high factual reporting. Strong reputation for straight news.

name: Associated Press
notes: Least biased. Very high factual reporting. Public corrections policy.

name: The New York Times
notes: Left-Center bias. High factual reporting. Strong on investigative work.

name: BBC
notes: Left-Center bias on some international topics. Generally high factual reporting.

name: The Guardian
notes: Left bias. High factual reporting. Strong progressive editorial line.

name: Breitbart News
notes: Extreme Right bias. Mixed to low factual reporting on political topics.

name: The Washington Post
notes: Left-Center bias. High factual reporting. Strong on U.S. politics.
